# Payment Authorization

Payment authorization involves verifying a card for the total order amount without capturing the funds until the items are shipped. If an order is canceled prior to shipping, the authorization hold is released by the issuing bank within three to five business days. For split shipments, each parcel is charged separately, which may result in customers receiving multiple smaller charges instead of a single total charge.

[Source: payment_methods.md#payment-authorization]
